name: Alliance Aviation Services Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 79% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.5700, stop A$0.4752, target A$0.6300 (0.63:1) — then trail it.
